options.label: A
options.text: The area around a magnet where magnetic forces can be detected

options.label: B
options.text: The metal inside a magnet that makes it work

options.label: D
options.text: The colour of a magnetic material

correct_answer: The area around a magnet where magnetic forces can be detected
explanation: A magnetic field is the invisible region of space surrounding a magnet where its magnetic force can act on other magnets or magnetic materials. You cannot see it, but you can detect it by observing how magnets attract or repel each other.
